name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_uvw_equipment_nbv_dep_zftm_asseteqip
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_equipment_nbv_dep_zftm_asseteqip' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`lease_start_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`notice_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`asset_capitalization_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`agreement_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`capitalization_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`planned_retirement_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`deactivation_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`aquisition_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`depreciation_calculation_start_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`book_value_start_of_year` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`lease_start_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`notice_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`asset_capitalization_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`agreement_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`capitalization_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`planned_retirement_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`deactivation_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`aquisition_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`depreciation_calculation_start_date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`book_value_start_of_year` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'lease_start_date|notice_date|asset_capitalization_date|agreement_date|capitalization_date|planned_retirement_date|deactivation_date|aquisition_date|depreciation_calculation_start_date|book_value_start_of_year' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport`.`uvw_equipment_nbv_dep_zftm_asseteqip`
